text: Good morning Jarvis! What's on the calendar for this Friday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Friday, November 22. You have sprint planning at 10 AM, and Ethan has piano with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Writing up user stories for our upcoming sprint. Our Twilio integration is throwing 503 rate limit errors during signups. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. That is a common bottleneck. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Bedtime can be a challenge. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Planning for future education costs. We just signed the mortgage papers and closed on our Frisco house. Financial planning is key for the kids.
title: Finance Update

text: Logged that. I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. Congratulations! Owning your home in Frisco is a major milestone for the family. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reflecting on my job transition from MedFuture Systems to Vertex Health. Our Twilio integration is throwing 400 rate limit errors during signups. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. I checked the recent logs for that. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. We need to sign his permission slip for the field trip to the science museum. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: Understood. He is doing so well. I've added the deadline and details to the calendar so we don't forget. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Managing some allergy issues today. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Understood. Great consistency with running. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Just wanted to mention that anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Let's break this down. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. That is a clean implementation. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Lily refused to eat her dinner today. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Screen time is always a negotiation. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that calculating some savings estimates. We just signed the mortgage papers and closed on our Frisco house. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Sure thing! Smart financial planning. Congratulations! Owning your home in Frisco is a major milestone for the family. Let me know when you want to execute.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: Analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. VP Greg Holloway is complaining about the infrastructure costs for CareConnect. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. I've noted that. We can present a cost-benefit analysis showing that dropping these optimizations will cost more in support tickets. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, We're talking about Ethan's academic progress. He wants to build a clay model of Saturn for his science project. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: Sure thing! School projects are fun. We have clay and foam rings in the garage storage shelves that will be perfect. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update: Went for a run around the neighborhood. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Health has to be a priority.
title: Health Update

text: Interesting. Great consistency with running. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Busy day at Vertex Health. CareConnect prep is moving along. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
